author: aKidWolfe-Hxnter-UncleClaude
install_msg:
Thanks for installing TCG Tracker!

Before using, set your Best Buy API key (free at developer.bestbuy.com):
  `[p]tcgset bestbuy_key <your_key>`

Then set your alert channel and role:
  `[p]tcgset channel #channel`
  `[p]tcgset role @role`

Add products with: `[p]tcgadd <upc> <msrp> <product name>`

For in-store inventory checks, add ZIP codes:
  `[p]tcgset zip 27360`

Walmart, Target, GameStop, and Pokémon Center are scraped automatically — no additional keys needed.
name: TCGTracker
short: Track Pokémon TCG product drops across major retailers by UPC, with in-store availability by ZIP code.
description: Monitors Pokémon TCG products by UPC across Best Buy, Walmart, Target, GameStop, and Pokémon Center. Alerts a Discord channel with a role ping when a product is found in stock online, showing price vs MSRP. Also supports in-store inventory checks for configured ZIP codes, shown during manual checks. Alerts fire once per restock cycle to prevent spam.
